title: Device Home Screen - No Device connected - Supported List - User Guides
scenario: Supported Devices list displays all Poly devices and correct user guides when no device is connected
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure no Poly Bluetooth audio device is currently connected to the phone.
3. On the Home screen, locate and tap the 'Supported Devices' option.
4. Observe the list of supported Poly devices displayed on the screen.
5. Tap on the first device listed under the 'User Guides' section.
6. Verify that the correct user guide for that specific device is displayed.
7. Return to the Supported Devices list.
8. Repeat steps 5-7 for each device listed under User Guides.
expected: The Supported Devices list shows all supported Poly devices when no device is connected. Tapping on each device under User Guides displays the correct user guide for that specific device.
